summary: Portfolio lifted off last week's stalled verdict to at-risk: three repos (Hordes, Scheduler, Chains) shipped releases and the git lock that froze every write cleared for most repos. But three projects sit at-risk (Chains, Apothecary, Budget) and the defining problem moved into the release pipeline: the write-dashboard-status.ps1 clobber that nulls the barRaise block went from latent to live (Chains and Scheduler nulled their own dashboard data on release this week), and Scheduler's first release in thirteen cycles shipped a leaked webhook, a raw em-dash to the public Discord, and a deploy-breaking TypeScript error at once because no release.ps1 has a preship gate. The worst single exposure is Budget: a ten-day-cold tree now holds un-recreatable backend source, one FUSE clobber from losing an unreleased MINOR.

topActions.label: Make write-dashboard-status.ps1 read-modify-write in Hordes, Chains, Scheduler, Apothecary; it is nulling live barRaise blocks on release
Add a preship build/typecheck + version-marker gate to every release.ps1
P0: git-tracked live Discord webhook used by two releases this week; gitignore, git rm --cached, rotate
Commit the 10-day-cold tree before a FUSE clobber destroys un-recreatable backend source (ten insights endpoints)
Add save_version + load guard to world3d_save.json and reconcile the GDD 2D-vs-3D render-spec contradiction
Ship a product slice (M1 or named audio source); one quiet cycle from stalled
Ship anything and commit the dirty tree; one quiet day from stalled
Consolidate the styles-v2..v13 and mobile-hooks..mobile-hooks-6 accretion before 1.0
Route standing AI-autonomous structural HIGHs (Chains x3 @ 13 cycles, Apothecary x2) to an attended drain
Gate the daily bar-raise on HEAD-moved-since-last-review to stop no-delta reprints on cold repos
